prompt:
Goal: Create a dynamic cinematic astrology-themed fitness poster featuring Mr. Tariq as an athletic man sprinting across a marble kitchen counter, with his face intentionally covered by a centered opaque warm-brown square privacy block.

Canvas: Vertical 3:4 composition, high-resolution photorealistic fantasy advertising style, warm golden-hour sunlight from large windows on the right, shallow depth of field, dramatic motion blur, glowing particles, coffee splashes, and spicy red-orange accents.

Main subject: One athletic adult man with medium skin tone and short dark styled hair, wearing a sleeveless red athletic top, black running shorts, and running shoes. He is mid-sprint directly toward the viewer, torso leaning forward, one fist raised, one arm back, one knee lifted. Place a solid rectangular privacy mask over the entire face area, matching a medium tan/brown skin-like color, with sharp edges and no facial details visible.

Foreground character: One cute anthropomorphic coffee cup running away in the lower right foreground. The cup is white ceramic with speckles, a handle on the right, big glossy cartoon eyes, arched eyebrows, blushing cheeks, an open smiling mouth, two small black arms, and two small black legs. Coffee erupts from the cup in a dramatic splash with dark liquid arcs and droplets.

Setting and props: A modern kitchen or café interior with a glossy marble countertop, jars and kitchen objects softly blurred in the background, tall sunlit windows on the right, and warm reflections on the counter. Scatter coffee beans, coffee droplets, glowing spice fragments, and red chili pieces across the counter. Include exactly 4 visible chili elements: one large red chili flying in the lower left foreground, one whole red chili lying on the counter near the bottom center-left, one small red chili icon beside the spicy-coffee note, and one small red chili piece near the coffee splash.

Graphic overlays and text: Add hand-drawn glowing horoscope and lifestyle annotations in white and orange marker-like script. Include exactly 4 text groups: 1) upper left: a glowing orange Aries symbol with the words "Bold & Fearless" beneath it; 2) left middle/lower: "Loves Strong Spicy Coffee" written in stacked white handwritten script; 3) right middle: "Boosts Energy & Confidence" in white handwritten script; 4) bottom right signature: "Mr. Tariq" in large white cursive with an orange underline. Include exactly 2 small heart doodles, exactly 1 orange star doodle near the top right, and several curved motion lines around the runner and cup.

Style: Photorealistic subject and environment combined with playful illustrated doodles, energetic Aries personality, bold fearless mood, spicy coffee branding, high contrast warm lighting, rich amber highlights, sparks and splashes frozen in motion, premium social-media poster look.

Constraints: Keep all visible text legible and in English. Do not add extra words beyond the 4 specified text groups. Keep the face fully hidden by the solid square block. No watermark, no logo other than small abstract athletic mark on the shirt.
